description: Composition:100% cotton blue sleeveless top with sphagetti straps and short white shorts with blue, orange and pink checks and Daisy printsWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitKeep your little girl cool this summer as she plays around in this blue, sleeveless, spaghetti strapped top and white shorts checkered with blue, pink and orange lines from disney. A pretty print of Daisy on the top and skirt reflects the pretty look of your little girl.
